hooks.command: FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('file_path',''))"); RUFF=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/venv/bin/ruff; [ -x "$RUFF" ] || exit 0; [[ -n "$FILE" && "$FILE" == *.py ]] && "$RUFF" check --fix --unsafe-fixes "$FILE" && "$RUFF" format "$FILE"; true

CMD=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('command',''))") || exit 2; printf '%s\n' "$CMD" | grep -qE "(rm[[:space:]]+-[a-zA-Z]*[rR][a-zA-Z-]*|rm[[:space:]]+--recursive|git push --force|git push -f|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM|UPDATE[[:space:]]|ALTER[[:space:]]+TABLE)" && echo BLOCKED && exit 2 || exit 0
